zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathan Tilley於1443年出生在英國貝德福爾時，他的父親Charles Henry Tilley30歲，母親Agnes Johnstone Alexander30歲。他於大約1464年與Adelaide Tylle在英國英格蘭貝德福爾特拉爾 貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1465年在英國貝德福爾亨洛福享年22歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾特拉爾 貝德福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Tilley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tilly-sur-Seulles (Calvados) or Tilly (Eure), France.

English: habitational name from Tyley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire), Tiley in Minterne Magna (Dorset), or Tilley (Shropshire). The Gloucestershire and Dorset placenames derive from Old English tigel ‘tile’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Shropshire placename derives from an uncertain first element + Old English lēah.
English: occupational name from Middle English tilie ‘one who tills the land, a husbandman’. Compare Tiller .

variants.name: Tillie
meanings: English (northern England and southern Scotland): variant of   Tilley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tiller
meanings: English (southern, especially Hampshire): occupational name from Middle English tiliere, tilyer ‘one who tills the soil, husbandman, farmer, farm laborer’. This is a derivative of Old English tilian ‘to till (the soil)’, Middle English tilie. There has been some confusion of this name with Tyler .

variants.name: Tiley
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Somerset and Wiltshire): variant of   Tilley  .

nameMeanings.name: Nathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘he (God) has given’ in Hebrew (  compare  Nathaniel  ). This was the name of a prophet who had the courage to reproach  King David  for arranging the death in battle of Uriah the Hittite in order to get possession of the latter's wife Bathsheba (2 Samuel 12:1–15). It was also the name of one of David's own sons. In modern times this name has often been taken as a short form of   Nathaniel   or of   Jonathan .  Since the 1990s it has been much favoured throughout the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Nathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘he (God) has given’ in Hebrew (  compare  Nathaniel  ). This was the name of a prophet who had the courage to reproach  King David  for arranging the death in battle of Uriah the Hittite in order to get possession of the latter's wife Bathsheba (2 Samuel 12:1–15). It was also the name of one of David's own sons. In modern times this name has often been taken as a short form of   Nathaniel   or of   Jonathan .  Since the 1990s it has been much favoured throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nathan Tilley was born in 1443, in Bedfordshire, England, his father, Charles Henry Tilley, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Johnstone Alexander, was 30. He married Adelaide Tylle about 1464, in Central Bedfordshire, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1465, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 22, and was buried in Central Bedfordshire, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nathan Tilley est né en 1443, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Charles Henry Tilley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Johnstone Alexander, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide Tylle environ 1464, à Central Bedfordshire, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1465, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 22 ans, et a été enterré à Central Bedfordshire, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nathan Tilleyが1443年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Charles Henry Tilleyは30歳，母Agnes Johnstone Alexanderは30歳であった。約1464年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアセントラル ベドフォードシュアイアでAdelaide Tylleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1465年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで22歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアセントラル ベドフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nathan Tilley(이)가 1443년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles Henry Tilley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Johnstone Alexander(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 세트럴 베드퍼드실르에서 Adelaide Tylle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1465년 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 22세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 세트럴 베드퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Adelaide Tylle aproximadamente 1464, em Central Bedfordshire, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathan Tilley родился в 1443 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Charles Henry Tilley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Johnstone Alexander, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide Tylle около 1464 г. в местности кентраль бедфордшир, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1465 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 22 лет и был похоронен в местности кентраль бедфордшир, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
